hero_subtitle: Pantrypoints is a new economic system that uses bilateral points based on the price of grains to solve all economic problems.
quote1: Among the Mongols who are ignorant of the use of money, cattle are the measures of value. Wealth to them consisted in cattle, as to the Spaniards it consisted in gold and silver. Of the two, the Mongol notion, was nearest to the truth.
home_why_subtitle: A complete ecosystem for the moneyless economy
home_explore_subtitle: Discover tools built for every aspect of the moneyless economy.
feat_points_desc: Replace money with community points that reflect real value.
feat_community_desc: Built for cooperatives, local groups, and mutual aid networks.
feat_global_desc: From your neighborhood to international trade networks.
feat_fair_desc: Open ledger, democratic governance, no hidden fees.
step_join_desc: Register and connect with your local Pantrypoints community.
step_offer_desc: List what you can offer and what you need from others.
step_exchange_desc: Complete trades and grow your points balance over time.
register_subtitle: Be among the first to experience a points-based economy in your community.
register_success_msg: Thank you for registering! We will be in touch soon.
err_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
err_server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
apps_subtitle: A suite of tools for building and managing moneyless economies in your community.
news_subtitle: Updates, insights, and stories from the Pantrypoints community.
footer_tagline: Building a world without money, one point at a time.
persona_businessOwnerDesc: I need online presence as a website, web app, mobile app, or social media
persona_frequentShopperDesc: I want to get rewards for my brand loyalty
persona_unemployedDesc: I need to get a job but don't have the required skills
persona_teacherDesc: I need to take attendance and visualize student performance
persona_healthConsciousDesc: Healthcare is expensive so I need to eat right
persona_investorDesc: I want my investments to make a lot of impact
persona_bankerDesc: I want a solution to banking crises. The stress is too much
persona_farmerDesc: I need a solution to global warming!
persona_governmentDesc: We need to earn more revenue for public services
ppis: Pantrypoints is a new economic system that uses points instead of money.
